tracks.rawText: 7:59electronic jesusv5.5Psytrance ritual / tribal at 145–150 BPM with rolling 16th-note bass, crisp offbeat open hats, and tom-heavy tribal percussion, Layered hand drums, shakers, woodblocks, and ethnic frame drums drive the groove, while resonant acid synth stabs, filtered drones, and echo-drenched FX builds create a dense, hypnotic, earthy texture2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:00electronic jesusv5.5Driving electronic track with punchy 4/4 kick, crisp claps, tight closed hi-hats, and a deep 808 sub-bass foundation, Layered analog synth arpeggios, filtered pad chords, and glitchy percussion details create a polished, high-energy club texture with sidechain pumping, stereo widening, and a clean, glossy mix1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:29donalev5.5Regional Mexican Corrido Tumbado, Acoustic instrumentation features two twelve-string guitars (requinto and armonía) and a tololoche (double bass), The lead guitar plays rapid, chromatic melodic runs and double-stops with a bright, percussive attack, The rhythm guitar provides a constant percussive strumming pattern emphasizing the off-beats, The tololoche plays a syncopated, walking bassline with heavy string slap, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, almost spoken-word melodic style with slight nasal resonance, The tempo is 135 BPM in 3/4 time signature, The key is G Major1PublishRemix
tracks.title: donale
